现在用户端有明显好用了么？
截至 `2026-04-18`，如果标准是“用户现在能稳定明显感觉更好用了”，我的判断是：`还不能稳妥地这么说`。 更准确地说是两层：
怎么解决，如果这个问题不解决，其他的都不要做
能解，而且方向很明确。关键是别再把它当成“继续做更多功能”，而是把它当成一个单独的 `UX bug` 来收。 我已经先把控制面改了：`.codex/status.md`、`.codex/plan.md` 和几个 host view 现在都回到“只解决用户体感不明显，`Stage 12` 暂停”。
继续做了，且这轮只动了“用户体感”主线。 我已经落了两类实改：
继续做完了两块核心实现，都是围着“用户体感”来的。 这轮代码改动： - `src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js`：默认 recent-message 窗口缩到 `12`，assistant/context 压缩更狠，减少把长历史继续带进当前轮。 - `src/dialogue-working-set-shadow.js` 和…

decision.archive_summary: The conversation is focused on one active task: improving clearly noticeable UX in Codex by reducing prompt/context bloat rather than adding features. The assistant said Stage 12 work was paused to prioritize this UX issue, reported concrete implementation changes around context-minor-GC and working-set trimming, and then gave the user Codex-side validation steps. The latest user turn asks the assistant to run or perform the testing itself.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same active topic, so relation=continue. The next turn depends on the recent raw evidence: the user demanded the UX issue be the only priority, the assistant claimed concrete fixes, and the user then asked how to validate before asking whether the assistant can test directly. Those turns should stay raw. t1 is an older status snapshot about stage/control-plane bookkeeping and is not needed for answering the current testing request, so it can leave the next-turn prompt. No semantic pins are necessary because there are no separate durable user facts or style rules unique to this transcript that need preservation beyond the active raw turns.
